results.justification: EXACT TWIN — PCL selects intermediate-difficulty prompts via learned value model IS the curriculum stage-difficulty selection mechanism in KATA-CHECKPOINT.
Limits of CL for post-training covers the difficulty-staged + post-training paradigm with mixed results.
EXACT TWIN — performance-based progression with advancement criteria + regression on threshold IS the mastery-gate-checkpoint + adaptive-resample mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — systematic CL with pacing + interleaved variants IS the curriculum-stage difficulty-ordered training paradigm.
Beyond Random Sampling accelerated convergence via curriculum order IS the staged-progression effect.
Curriculum-Guided Layer Scaling stratified curriculum + per-stage layer-scaling IS the per-stage-adaptation effect within curriculum.
LR decay × curriculum interaction covers schedule-curriculum coupling paradigm.
Bilateral training with curriculum + gating + checkpoint advancement covers the paired uke-tori + mastery-gate combined paradigm.
